headline: Xiaomi's MIMO hits 18.2% — a new all-time high
summary: Xiaomi/mimo-v2.5-20260422 just claimed the top spot with 18.2% token share, the highest single-model share ever recorded on OpenRouter. DeepSeek holds second at 10.2%, while Tencent's hy3 notches its second consecutive day atop the all-time charts at 8.3%. Meanwhile, Anthropic's collective share dropped 0.9% in a day, and OpenAI's gpt-5.4 took a brutal 18-rank tumble.
highlights: Xiaomi/mimo-v2.5-20260422 reaches 18.2% token share — all-time record
Tencent/hy3-20260706 holds day 2 of its own all-time high at 8.3%
Anthropic down 0.9% in 24 hours; Claude-4.8-opus fell from rank 9 to 10
OpenAI/gpt-5.4-20260305 plummets 18 ranks in one day to rank 42
Xiaomi provider share now 19.3% (+0.97% today); DeepSeek at 16.2%
Four new entrants: Qwen models (ranks 34, 51), OpenAI gpt-5-mini (49), Poolside laguna-xs (50)
Four dropouts: Qwen embedding, Poolside variants, OpenAI text-embedding-3-large
